name: Lionbridge
description: Lionbridge — Global language service provider with translation API, AI training data, and localization services.

seo.title: Lionbridge — Localization / Translation API
seo.meta_description: Lionbridge: Lionbridge — Global language service provider with translation API, AI training data, and localization services.

when_to_use: Global localization for enterprise software products
AI training data collection across 300+ languages
Legal and medical translation with subject expertise
Translation API for high-volume content localization
Continuous localization for agile product teams

pros: Massive language coverage and translator pool
Mature localization, testing, and AI data services
Can handle video, audio, and specialized domains
cons: Pricing and contracts aimed at enterprise budgets
Self-serve API experience is weaker than boutique tools
Project kickoff slower than SaaS-only competitors
Quality varies across regions and language pairs
review.verdict: Reliable default for global enterprise localization programs; not the move if you want developer-first self-serve.
review.best_for: Global brands needing full-service localization across dozens of languages
review.not_for: Small teams wanting a quick, dev-first translation API
